calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llcs Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeff Palmer of Greenberg Traurig, LLP telephone number 415-655-1267 for Petitioner Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon is granted. No opposition filed. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
